note: Strategic Slop Engine roadmap issue data. Existing completed/superseded MAIN and MAIN1 issues were closed during PR #256 follow-up; validate and dry-run this file before applying new ENGINE issue creation.
prStrategy: Issues are planning atoms, not automatic one-PR-per-task instructions. Prefer mid-large bounded-context PR chunks that group several related tasks when docs, tests, and ownership can move together. Split only at strong ownership, risk, or review-size boundaries.

epics.title: EPIC ENGINE-00: Roadmap Activation and Project Hygiene
epics.summary: Verify the post-cleanup issue set, activate ENGINE roadmap tracking, and keep project state aligned with the strategic docs.
epics.goal: Start engine-foundation implementation from a clean project picture after the completed/superseded MAIN and MAIN1 cleanup.
nonGoals: No Node/npm compatibility unless explicitly scoped.
No package-manager behavior.
No public alpha docs or marketing claims before the ENGINE evidence gate.
No benchmark claims from smoke/list checks.
No PostgreSQL or SQL Server JS bridge work before SQLite foundation is excellent.
No generated/build artifacts.
implementationRequirements: Treat this EPIC as a parent outcome; implementation should land through mid-large bounded-context PR chunks.
Keep claims tied to executable evidence and explicit gates.
Preserve hard boundaries from AGENTS.md and relevant module docs.
acceptanceCriteria: Supported behavior is documented as supported, deferred, or rejected.
Tests verify documented intent, not accidental implementation details.
Docs and issue scope stay aligned with implementation.
The PR remains a coherent bounded context, not a one-line trickle task or an unreviewable mega-PR.
recommendedPrGrouping: Use this EPIC to group several related task issues into mid-large bounded-context PRs.
Split only when ownership, risk, or review size makes one chunk hard to validate.

tasks.title: TASK ENGINE-00.A: Verify Post-Cleanup Issue Set
tasks.parentEpic: EPIC ENGINE-00: Roadmap Activation and Project Hygiene
tasks.summary: Verify that only genuinely unfinished pre-ENGINE issues remain open after PR #256 cleanup.
tasks.goal: The issue tracker has no completed MAIN/MAIN1 parent or superseded benchmark/public-alpha noise before ENGINE issues are created.
scope: Deliver this issue as part of its recommended bounded-context chunk.
Keep implementation/docs/tests aligned with the final-shape and layered-roadmap docs.
nonGoals: No Node/npm compatibility unless explicitly scoped.
No package-manager behavior.
No public alpha docs or marketing claims before the ENGINE evidence gate.

Update docs/ADRs when behavior, architecture, public API, diagnostics, workflow, or evidence changes.
Add or update tests for documented intent.
Keep implemented/deferred boundaries explicit.
qualityGates: Read AGENTS.md and the listed source docs before editing.
Keep the PR as a mid-large bounded context when related tasks share ownership and tests.
Run the canonical Windows workflow or explain any unavailable gate.
Report default, V8-gated, live-provider, package, and benchmark evidence separately.
No OS APIs outside src/platform/*.
No V8 types outside src/engine/v8/*.
No raw native pointers exposed to JavaScript.
